nasb.text: while they also, by prayer on your behalf, yearn for you because of the surpassing grace of God in you.

esv.text: while they long for you and pray for you, because of the surpassing grace of God upon you.

cnv.text: 因著　神在你們身上的厚恩，他們就為你們禱告，切切地想念你們。

ccb.text: 他们也会因上帝赐给你们的丰盛恩典而热切地为你们祷告。

csbs.text: 并且他们因着神赐给你们这无限的恩典，就切切地想念你们，为你们祈祷。
